function.name: changelog.Add
function.description: Create changelog entry for an Addition

note.description: Single-line description, has to start with "Added ..."

function.name: changelog.Change
function.description: Create changelog entry for a Change

note.description: Single-line description, has to start with "Changed ..."

function.name: changelog.Deprecate
function.description: Create changelog entry for a Deprecation

note.description: Single-line description, has to start with "Deprecated ..."

function.name: changelog.Fix
function.description: Create changelog entry for a Fix

note.description: Single-line description, has to start with "Fixed ..."

function.name: changelog.Remove
function.description: Create changelog entry for a Removal

note.description: Single-line description, has to start with "Removed ..."

function.name: changelog.Search
function.description: Search changelog for entries of a specific file
